tasks.label: Run Domain2 tests after assertion fixes
Diagnose git pull
args: cd /Users/allyn/Repos/ClubBaist-test && echo '---status---' && git status -sb && echo '---remote---' && git remote -v && echo '---branch---' && git branch -vv && echo '---pull.rebase---' && git config --get pull.rebase || true && echo '---pull.ff---' && git config --get pull.ff || true && echo '---fetch---' && git fetch --all --prune && echo '---pull---' && git pull

tasks.label: Fix git pull with autostash
args: cd /Users/allyn/Repos/ClubBaist-test && git pull --rebase --autostash && echo '---post-status---' && git status -sb

tasks.label: Re-run PlayingConditionService tests after seed fix
Kill AppHost now
args: pkill -f 'ClubBaist.AppHost/ClubBaist.AppHost.csproj' || true; sleep 1; echo '---remaining processes---'; pgrep -fal 'ClubBaist.AppHost/ClubBaist.AppHost.csproj' || true; echo '---port 17289---'; lsof -nP -iTCP:17289 -sTCP:LISTEN || true

tasks.label: Verify AppHost stopped
args: echo '---matching process---'; pgrep -fal ClubBaist.AppHost.csproj || true; echo '---port 17289---'; lsof -nP -iTCP:17289 -sTCP:LISTEN || true

tasks.label: Verify AppHost stopped noquotes
args: echo ---matching-process---; pgrep -fal ClubBaist.AppHost.csproj || true; echo ---port-17289---; lsof -nP -iTCP:17289 -sTCP:LISTEN || true

tasks.label: Confirm AppHost process absent
args: ps -ax | grep '[d]otnet run --project ClubBaist.AppHost/ClubBaist.AppHost.csproj' || true; lsof -nP -iTCP:17289 -sTCP:LISTEN || true

tasks.label: Final AppHost stop verification
args: ps -ax | grep dotnet | grep ClubBaist.AppHost.csproj | grep -v grep || true; echo CHECK_PORT; lsof -nP -iTCP:17289 -sTCP:LISTEN || true

tasks.label: Copy screenshots to clear names
args: cd /Users/allyn/Repos/ClubBaist-test && mkdir -p screenshots && [ -f screenshots/standing-tee-times-member.png ] && cp -f screenshots/standing-tee-times-member.png screenshots/01-standing-requests-member-view.png || true && [ -f screenshots/standing-tee-times-admin.png ] && cp -f screenshots/standing-tee-times-admin.png screenshots/02-standing-requests-admin-management.png || true && [ -f screenshots/standing-booking-example-allocated-request.png ] && cp -f screenshots/standing-booking-example-allocated-request.png screenshots/03-standing-booking-example-allocated-request.png || true && [ -f screenshots/score-console.png ] && cp -f screenshots/score-console.png screenshots/04-score-console-eligible-rounds.png || true && [ -f screenshots/record-score.png ] && cp -f screenshots/record-score.png screenshots/05-score-entry-and-adjusted-calculation.png || true && [ -f screenshots/score-confirmation-handicap.png ] && cp -f screenshots/score-confirmation-handicap.png screenshots/06-score-submission-handicap-result.png || true && ls -1 screenshots | sort
